column1: # Source: CDC/NCHS, National Vital Statistics Reports, Vol. 74 No. 12 (Dec 4, 2025)
#         U.S. State Life Tables, 2022. Table A — Life expectancy at birth, total population.
# Note:   CDC publishes NVSR only as PDF. Values hand-extracted from Table A, p. 3.
